name: vine-detect
tagline: Find the software a business runs, live, and the URL to act on it
description: Vine detects the customer-facing software a business actually transacts through (OpenTable, Mindbody, Toast, Calendly, and more) and resolves the exact URL where a customer can book, order, reserve, or schedule. Live per-request scan, not a cached fingerprint lookup. Skip this when you already have a working, direct integration with the business's booking system.
pricing: Free: 1,000 credits on signup, no card. A live detect costs ~12-26 credits; cached repeats cost ~1-2.
